debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝³ : OrderBot ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝¹ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace ι
hX1 : @ProbabilityTheory.HasLocallyIntegrableSup ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ X 𝓕 P
hX2 : Adapted 𝓕 X
h𝓕 : 𝓕.IsRightContinuous
⊢ Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassDL ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P

failed_attempts:
refine hX1.mono fun Y hY ↦ MeasureTheory.Integrable.classDL fun t ↦ ?_
  have : (fun ω ↦ ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖Y t ω‖ₑ) = (fun ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖ₑ) := by
    ext; simp only [iSup_le_iff, le_refl, iSup_pos, iSup_const]
  rw [this]
  exact (hY.2 t).mono' sorry (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ le_iSup₂_of_le t le_rfl le_rfl)

have : Nonempty ι := ⟨⊥⟩
  rcases hX1 with ⟨T, hT, hT_lim, hT_prop⟩
  refine ⟨T, hT, hT_lim, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
  have hY_ad : Adapted 𝓕 (stoppedProcess X (T n)) := Adapted.stoppedProcess hX2 (T n)
  apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.classDL
  intro t
  refine ((hT_prop n).2 t).mono ?_ ?_
  · exact ((hY_ad t).mono (𝓕.le t)).ennnorm
  · filter_upwards with ω
    rw [iSup₂_eq_const (h := ⟨⊥, bot_le⟩)]
    exact le_iSup₂_of_le t le_rfl le_rfl

rcases hX1 with ⟨T, hT, hT_lim, h_sup⟩
  refine ⟨T, hT, hT_lim, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
  apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.classDL
  intro t
  have h_le : ∀ ω, ‖stoppedProcess X (T n) t ω‖ₑ ≤ ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖stoppedProcess X (T n) s ω‖ₑ :=
    fun ω ↦ le_iSup₂ t le_rfl
  have h_eq : ∀ ω, (⨆ s ≤ t, ‖stoppedProcess X (T n) t ω‖ₑ) = ‖stoppedProcess X (T n) t ω‖ₑ :=
    fun ω ↦ le_antisymm (iSup₂_le fun _ _ ↦ le_rfl) (le_iSup₂ t le_rfl)
  refine (Integrable.mono ((h_sup n).2 t) ((Adapted.stoppedProcess hX2 (T n)) t).aestronglyMeasurable
    (Eventually.of_forall h_le)).congr (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ (h_eq ω).symm)

rcases hX1 with ⟨T, hT, hX_int⟩
  refine ⟨T, hT, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
  haveI : Nonempty ι := ⟨⊥⟩
  apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.classDL
  intro t
  refine (hX_int n).2 t |>.mono ?_ ?_

  refine ⟨T, hT, hlim, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
  apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.classDL
  intro t
  apply ((hSup n).2 t).mono

obtain ⟨T, hT, hTX⟩ := hX1
  refine ⟨T, hT, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
  specialize hTX n
  let Y := stoppedProcess X (T n)
  have hY_ad : Adapted 𝓕 Y := hX2.stoppedProcess (T n)
  apply MeasureTheory.Integrable.classDL
  intro t
  have h_le : (fun ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖ₑ) ≤ᵐ[P] (fun ω ↦ ⨆ s ≤ t, ‖Y s ω‖ₑ) := by
    filter_upwards with ω
    exact le_iSup₂_of_le t le_rfl le_rfl
  have h_int : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖Y t ω‖ₑ) P :=
    (hTX.2 t).mono' ((hY_ad t).mono (𝓕.le t)).aestronglyMeasurable h_le
  convert h_int with ω
  have : Nonempty {s | s ≤ t} := ⟨t, le_rfl⟩
  simp [iSup_const]
